headline: Johnson & Johnson (JNJ) Buys Spine Tech And Wins FDA Nod For Heart Device
summary: DePuy Synthes, part of Johnson & Johnson MedTech, has acquired spine surgery company Expanding Innovations, adding new expandable interbody technologies to its portfolio. Johnson & Johnson has received FDA approval for its Dual Energy THERMOCOOL SMARTTOUCH SF Platform in electrophysiology, expanding its ablation technology offering. For investors watching Johnson & Johnson, ticker NYSE:JNJ, these MedTech moves arrive with the stock at $253.04 and a value_score of 2. The company has recorded...

headline: 3 Biggest Pharma Giants: Buy, Sell or Hold?
summary: All three pharma giants have left the S&P 500 in the dust, but surging returns and strong fundamentals tell very different stories about where each stock goes from here.

headline: Would You Rather Earn $55,000 Today or $110,000 in 20 Years?
summary: A portfolio paying $55,000 this year feels useful today, but inflation has a way of quietly making that same paycheck feel smaller every year you spend it. The yield you choose right now could either protect your retirement income or slowly hollow it out.

raw.headline: Would You Rather Earn $55,000 Today or $110,000 in 20 Years?
raw.summary: A portfolio paying $55,000 this year feels useful today, but inflation has a way of quietly making that same paycheck feel smaller every year you spend it. The yield you choose right now could either protect your retirement income or slowly hollow it out.

headline: From a $38,000 Income to $84,000 Without Investing Another Dollar
summary: Most investors chase the biggest dividend check they can find today, but that instinct quietly sabotages the income they could be collecting a decade from now. The math behind a smarter approach is almost offensively simple once you see it.

raw.headline: From a $38,000 Income to $84,000 Without Investing Another Dollar
raw.summary: Most investors chase the biggest dividend check they can find today, but that instinct quietly sabotages the income they could be collecting a decade from now. The math behind a smarter approach is almost offensively simple once you see it.

headline: The Portfolio That Lets You Ignore Inflation
summary: Headline inflation keeps rising faster than Social Security adjustments, quietly shrinking what retirement actually buys. A small, dedicated portfolio sleeve could fund those annual increases entirely from income, but the tier you choose changes everything about how much capital you actually need.

raw.headline: The Portfolio That Lets You Ignore Inflation
